rows.description: Monitoring of LVM2 mirrors, snapshots etc. using dmeventd or progress polling
Self Monitoring and Reporting Technology (SMART) Daemon

osquery_type_note: Classification: direct_match = query confirmed technique-specific IOC; temporal_context = system snapshot during technique window; platform_state = generic state, not technique-specific; mapped_query_only = query maps to technique but no rows returned; unrelated_context = data collected but unrelated to technique.
